name: @arkor/e2e-cli
description: Private E2E test suite for the `arkor` and `create-arkor` CLI scaffolders. Spawns the built `dist/bin.mjs` of each consumer in a temp dir and asserts on filesystem + stdout. Never published.

scripts.pretest:coverage: CREATE_ARKOR_BUILD_SOURCEMAP=1 pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=create-arkor --filter=arkor
